testcase.name: test_license_type_change_preserves_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_117_family_dashboard.py:296: in test_license_type_change_preserves_data assert change_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to change type: {change_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to change type: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","new_license_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"new_type":"honorary"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
